_comment: Reality config that should score red — every indicator fires worst-case. SNI is www.google.com (rank 2 in our top1k.json → -30 critical), port 443 (-15 critical), shortIds contain '0000' (all-zeros → -25 critical), connIdle missing (-15 critical). Combined = 100 - 30 - 15 - 25 - 15 - 10 (asn_match without --vps-asn) = 5, well below the red threshold.
